arts.ttl: Jorge Mendes eyes Juventus move for Antonio Silva
arts.sum: Jorge Mendes, the influential Portuguese agent set to receive the award for best European agent, has spoken to Tuttosport about one of his clients, Benfica defender Antonio Silva, who is of interest to Juventus as they look to address injuries to Bremer and Cabal. The post Jorge Mendes eyes Juventus move for Antonio Silva appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to be without Vinicius Junior for final La Liga match of 2024
arts.sum: Real Madrid were held to a very frustrating 3-3 draw on Saturday, as Rayo Vallecano managed to hold off late pressure to secure a valuable point – despite having been 2-0 up at one stage in the first half.
